view.name: Magaca:
view.allGoodNoErrors: Wax khalad ah ma jiraan! Ma jiraan khaladaad macluumaadka xiriirka ku jira!
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Ma hubtaa inaad dib u diri doonto iimaylka soo-dhawaynta?
view.welcomeEmailResent: Iimaylka soo-dhawaynta dib ayaa loo diray. Sanduuqaaga ka hubi.

order.findDomain: Domain-kaaga raadi oo heli karnimada hubi.
order.premiumAvailable: Haa! Domain-kaaga {domain} waa la heli karaa oo domain hodan ah. Diiwaangelinta otomaatig waa la joojiyay. Iimaysha {email} haddaad domain-kan iibsan doonto {cost} sanad kasta.
order.premiumTaken: Waan ka xumahay! Domain-kaaga {domain} horaan la qaatay! Horaan ayaad leedahay? Waxaad u wareejin kartaa, oo domain hodan ah. Diiwaangelinta otomaatig waa la joojiyay. Iimaysha {email} haddaad domain-kan iibsan doonto {cost} sanad kasta.
order.available: Haa! Domain-kaaga {domain} waa la heli karaa! Waxaad ka diiwaangelin kartaa {cost}. Kharashka cusboonaysiintu wuu noqon doonaa {renewal}.
order.taken: Waan ka xumahay! Domain-kaaga {domain} horaan la qaatay! Horaan ayaad leedahay? Waxaad u wareejin kartaa {cost}. Kharashka cusboonaysiintu wuu noqon doonaa {renewal}.
order.subscriptionAutoRenew: Ruqsaddu si otomaatig ah ayay u cusboonaan doontaa sanad kasta kadib {cost} ilaa la joojinayo.
order.subscriptionDisclaimer: Boqsiga sanduuqaan adoo saxiixaya, waxaad aqoonsaneysaa inaad iibsaneyso alaab ruqsad ah oo si otomaatig ah u cusboonaan doonta (Sida Shuruudaha Sare Lagu Sharaxay) oo loogu shugi doono kaarka deynta aad maanta bixineyso. Haddaad dooneyso inaad joojiso cusboonaysiinta otomaatigga ah, waxaad aadi kartaa portal-ka macaamiisha (Halkan) si aad u doorato adeegga firfircoon oo aad gujiso xiriiriyaha Joojinta ama iimaysha: billing{'@'}interserver.net ama hab kale oo lagu sharaxay Shuruudaha iyo Xaaladaha. Adoo sanduuqa saxiixaya oo Dalabkeyga Deji gujiya hoos, waxaad sidoo kale aqoonsaneysaa inaad akhriso, fahamto, oo aad ku ogolaatay Shuruudahayaga iyo Xaaladaha iyo Siyaasadda Sirta.
order.agreeCheckbox: Shuruudaha sare waan akhriyay oo waan ogolaanayaa.
order.searchingDomain: Fadlan sug! Magaca domain-kaan waa la raadinayaa.
order.loadingDomainFields: Fadlan sug! Goobaha domain-ka waa la rarayo.

nameservers.title: Servers-ka Magaca Domain-ka
nameservers.suggestedApplied: Servers-ka magacyada la soo jeediyay waa la codsaday. Kaydi gujiso si aad u kaydiso.
nameservers.deleteConfirm: Waxaad ku dhawaanaysaa tirtirka server-ka magaca domain-kaaga.

eppCode.title: Koodka EPP Iimayshaa
eppCode.confirmMessage: Ma hubtaa inaad u diri doonto Koodka EPP iimaylka diiwaansan?

whois.title: Sirnaanshaha Whois
whois.renewalNote: Sirnaanshaha Whois wuxuu cusboonaan doonaa 12 bilood kasta laga bilaabo taariikhda hawlgelinta. Kharashka cusboonaysiinta ajaaniska Sirnaanshaha Whois waa {cost}.
whois.notAvailable: Sirnaanshaha Whois kuma heli karo TLD-kan.
whois.currentlyEnabled: Sirnaanshaha Whois hadda ayaa loo shaqeeysiiyay {hostname}.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription1: Sirnaanshaha Xiriirka wuxuu qariyaa aqoonsiga Diiwaangelaha marka isticmaale uu WHOIS raadin ku sameeyo domain-ka Diiwaangelaha.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription2: Faa'iidada Sirnaanshaha Xiriirka leh waa in aqoonsiga Diiwaangelaha, oo ay ku jiraan cinwaanka guriga, lambarka telefoonka, iyo cinwaanka iimaylka, laga ilaalinayo spammers, tuugada aqoonsiga iyo xadgudubiyaasha.
whois.contactPrivacyDescription3: Marka Diiwaangelayaashu ay hawlgeliyaan adeegga Sirnaanshaha Xiriirka, macluumaadka xiriirka la qariyay ayaa ka muuqda xogta WHOIS ee dadweynaha.
whois.contactPrivacyAvailable: Sirnaanshaha xiriirka waxaa laga heli karaa {cost} domain kasta sanad kasta.
whois.enableNow: Si aad Sirnaanshaha Xiriirka u shaqeeysiiso Domain-kaaga, Hadda Dalabka Deji.
whois.confirmOrderMessage: Kharashka Sirnaanshaha Whois: {cost} sanad kasta. Ma hubtaa inaad dalabkaan deji doonto?
whois.orderSuccess: Dalabka sirnaanshaha Whois si guul leh ayaa loo dejiyay!
whois.enableMessage: Domain-kaaga {hostname} wuxuu leeyahay ajaaniska sirnaanshaha whois lacagta lagu bixiyay oo wali aan la hawlgelin. Ma doonaysaa inaad hadda hawlgaliso?
whois.whoisEnabled: Sirnaanshaha Whois hadda waa la shaqeeysiiyay.
whois.disableMessage: Domain-kaaga {hostname} ajaaniska Sirnaanshaha Whois hadda ayuu shaqeynayaa. Ma hubtaa inaad joojin oo joojisan doonto?
whois.whoisDisabled: Sirnaanshaha Whois waa la joojiyay oo la joojisay.

whoisToggle.title: Ajaaniska Sirnaanshaha Whois
whoisToggle.addonEnabled: Domain-kaaga {domain} ajaaniska Sirnaanshaha Whois Waa La Shaqeeysiiyay
whoisToggle.addonDisabled: Domain-kaaga {domain} ajaaniska Sirnaanshaha Whois Waa La Joojiyay
whoisToggle.confirmEnable: Ma hubtaa inaad Whois Shaqeynsan doonto?
whoisToggle.confirmDisable: Ma hubtaa inaad Joojin oo Joojisan doonto?

lock.inactivateLock: Ma doonaysaa inaad joojiso xidhitaanka domain-ka?

dnssec.title: Macluumaadka DNSSEC
dnssec.enterDigest: Qiimaha Nugulka Geli (Ma noqon karo {max} Xaraf ka badan)
dnssec.unableToParse: Qaabka diiwaanka DS lama fahin karin.
dnssec.confirmRemoveAll: Tani waxay ka saareysaa dhammaan diiwaannada DNSSEC domain-kaan.
dnssec.removeSuccess: Diiwaannada DNSSEC si guul leh ayaa loo saaray!
dnssec.saveSuccess: Diiwaannada DNSSEC si guul leh ayaa loo kaydiyay!
dnssec.noRecordsWarning: Fadlan ugu yaraan hal diiwaanka DNSSEC buuxi.

renew.title: Cusboonaysii
renew.tip1: Domain-ka waa in la cusboonaysiiyaa taariikhda dhacida ama ka hor.
renew.tip2: Haddii domain-ku dhacay, waxaa laga yaabaa in ay leedahay xilli naxariis ah taariikhda dhacida ka cusboonaysiinta.
renew.tip3: Sirnaanshaha Whois shaqeynso si aad u qariso Macluumaadkaaga Xiriirka marka isticmaalaha uu WHOIS raadin ku sameeyo domain-ka Diiwaangelaha.
renew.payExistingInvoice: Si aad domain-kaaga u cusboonaysiiso, fadlan qaybsashada jirta bixiso.
renew.confirmRenewalMessage: Kharashka wadarta: {cost}. Ma hubtaa inaad dalabkan cusboonaysiinta deji doonto?
renew.renewalOrderSuccess: Dalabka cusboonaysiinta domain-ka si guul leh ayaa loo dejiyay!
